title: Date and Sweet Spread Toast
description: A simple and delicious sweet spread made with dates and sweet spread, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: 1. Soak the dates in water for 30 minutes.
2. Drain the water and blend the dates in a blender until smooth.
3. Add the sweet spread to the blender and blend until well combined.
4. Add the chewy and British spread, if using, and blend until smooth.
5. Taste and adjust the sweetness as needed.
6. Spread the mixture on toast and serve.
